name: Taillow

name: Swellow

description: It can't stop itself from chasing moving things, and it runs in a circle, chasing its own tail.

description: It dislikes dirty places. It often searches for a comfortable place in which to groom itself.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

effect: Shuffle 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your deck.
name: Cassius

name: Evosoda

effect: Each Pokémon that has any Fairy Energy attached to it (both yours and your opponent's) has no Retreat Cost.

name: Hard Charm

effect: Search your deck for up to 2 basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

effect: Discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

effect: Double Colorless Energy provides ColorlessColorless Energy.
